member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs
member.summary: BCS (Binary Canonical Serialization) type factory and primitives for Sui/Move.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.U8(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.Byte})
member.summary: BCS type for 8-bit unsigned integer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.U16(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.UInt16})
member.summary: BCS type for 16-bit unsigned integer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.U32(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.UInt32})
member.summary: BCS type for 32-bit unsigned integer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.U64(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.UInt64})
member.summary: BCS type for 64-bit unsigned integer. Accepts ulong or string for large values.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.U128(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.String})
member.summary: BCS type for 128-bit unsigned integer. Read returns decimal string; write accepts BigInteger or string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.U256(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.String})
member.summary: BCS type for 256-bit unsigned integer. Read returns decimal string; write accepts BigInteger or string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.Bool(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.Boolean})
member.summary: BCS type for boolean (1 byte: 0 = false, 1 = true).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.Uleb128(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.UInt64})
member.summary: BCS type for ULEB128-encoded unsigned integer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.Bytes(System.Int32,MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.Byte[]})
member.summary: BCS type for a fixed-length byte array.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.ByteVector(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.Byte[]})
member.summary: BCS type for variable-length byte vector (length as ULEB128, then raw bytes).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.String(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{System.String})
member.summary: BCS type for UTF-8 string (length as ULEB128, then UTF-8 bytes).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.Option``1(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType{``0})
member.summary: BCS type for optional value: enum { None, Some(T) }.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.OptionRef``1(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType{``0})
member.summary: BCS type for optional reference type (null = None, non-null = Some).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.Vector``1(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType{``0},MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions{``0[]})
member.summary: BCS type for variable-length vector of T (length as ULEB128, then each element).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Bcs.Tuple``2(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType{``0},MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType{``1})
member.summary: BCS type for fixed-length tuple (elements serialized in order).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions`1
member.summary: Optional name and validation for BCS type factory methods.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions`1.Name
member.summary: Optional type name override.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsTypeOptions`1.Validate
member.summary: Optional validation (called in addition to built-in).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsValidation
member.summary: Shared validation helpers for BCS types.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncodeDecode
member.summary: Encoding/decoding helpers for BCS bytes to string and lexicographic comparison (e.g. for Map key ordering).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncodeDecode.EncodeStr(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncoding)
member.summary: Encodes bytes to a string using the specified encoding.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncodeDecode.DecodeStr(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncoding)
member.summary: Decodes a string to bytes using the specified encoding.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncodeDecode.CompareBcsBytes(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Compares two byte arrays lexicographically (byte-by-byte, then by length). Matches Rust Ord for Vec<u8> used for BTreeMap key ordering.
member.returns: Negative if first < second, zero if equal, positive if first > second.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncoding
member.summary: Supported string encodings for BCS byte representation (e.g. in ToString / FromHex).

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncoding.Hex
member.summary: Hexadecimal (lowercase, no prefix).

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncoding.Base64
member.summary: Base64.

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsEncoding.Base58
member.summary: Base58 (Bitcoin alphabet).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader
member.summary: Reads BCS-encoded data sequentially. Used by BCS type deserialization.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a reader over the given byte array. The array is not copied; do not modify it while reading. Prefer this overload when you already have a byte[] to avoid the copy made by the overload.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.#ctor(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Creates a reader over a copy of the given span (so the reader owns the buffer).

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Position
member.summary: Current read position (number of bytes consumed).

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Remaining
member.summary: Number of bytes available to read.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Shift(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the position by .
member.exception: Thrown when advancing past the end of the buffer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Read8
member.summary: Reads one byte (u8).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Read16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit unsigned integer (little-endian).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Read32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer (little-endian).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Read64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit unsigned integer (little-endian).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Read128
member.summary: Reads a 128-bit unsigned integer (little-endian), returned as decimal string for compatibility with TS.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.Read256
member.summary: Reads a 256-bit unsigned integer (little-endian), returned as decimal string for compatibility with TS.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.ReadBytes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads exactly bytes.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.ReadUleb128
member.summary: Reads a ULEB128-encoded unsigned integer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader.ReadVec``1(System.Func{MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader,System.Int32,System.Int32,``0})
member.summary: Reads a BCS vector: ULEB length then invoked length times.
member.param: Callback (reader, index, length) returning one element.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1
member.summary: Describes a BCS type: how to read from a reader, write to a writer, and optionally compute serialized size and validate input.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.Name
member.summary: Display name of the type (e.g. "u8", "vector<u8>").

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.#ctor(System.String,System.Func{MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader,`0},System.Action{`0,MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter},System.Func{`0,System.Nullable{System.Int32}},System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Creates a BCS type with the given read/write logic and optional size/validation.
member.param: Type name for errors and debugging.
Deserializes one value from the reader.
Serializes one value to the writer.
Optional. Returns fixed byte length for this value, or null if variable.
Optional. Throws if the value is invalid.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.Read(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsReader)
member.summary: Reads one value from the reader.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.Write(`0,MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter)
member.summary: Validates the value and writes it to the writer.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.GetSerializedSize(`0)
member.summary: Returns the serialized byte length for the value if known; otherwise null.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.Validate(`0)
member.summary: Validates the value (throws on invalid).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.Serialize(`0,MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions)
member.summary: Serializes the value to BCS bytes and returns a wrapper.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.Parse(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Deserializes one value from the given BCS bytes.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.FromHex(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes from a hex string (optional "0x" prefix).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.FromBase58(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes from a Base58 string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType`1.FromBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes from a Base64 string.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter
member.summary: Writes primitive and length-prefixed values in BCS (Binary Canonical Serialization) format for Sui. Supports configurable buffer growth and chainable write methods.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a writer with default options (1 KB initial size, no max size limit).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.#ctor(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions)
member.summary: Creates a writer with the given options.
member.param: Buffer size and growth options; if null, defaults are used.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.EnsureCapacity(System.Int32)
member.summary: Ensures the buffer has room for at least more bytes; grows up to max size.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU8(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes a single byte (unsigned 8-bit integer). Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU16(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit unsigned integer in little-endian order. Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU32(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit unsigned integer in little-endian order. Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU64(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit unsigned integer in little-endian order. Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU128(System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes a 128-bit unsigned integer in little-endian order. Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU128(System.Numerics.BigInteger)
member.summary: Writes a 128-bit unsigned integer from a big-integer value (0 to 2^128-1). Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteU256(System.Numerics.BigInteger)
member.summary: Writes a 256-bit unsigned integer from a big-integer value (0 to 2^256-1). Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteBytes(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes raw bytes. Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteLengthPrefixed(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a length-prefixed byte sequence (length as ULEB128, then raw bytes). Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteUleb128(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes an unsigned integer in ULEB128 variable-length encoding. Chainable.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.WriteVec``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{``0},System.Action{MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter,``0,System.Int32,System.Int32})
member.summary: Writes a vector by writing the length (ULEB128) then invoking the callback for each element. Chainable.
member.param: Called for each element with (this writer, element, index, totalCount).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriter.ToBytes
member.summary: Returns the serialized BCS bytes (only the written range).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions
member.summary: Options for buffer allocation and growth.

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions.DefaultInitialSize
member.summary: Default initial buffer size in bytes (1 KB).

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions.DefaultAllocateSize
member.summary: Default size to allocate when the buffer needs to grow.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions.InitialSize
member.summary: Initial size (in bytes) of the buffer. Default is .

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions.MaxSize
member.summary: Maximum size (in bytes) the buffer is allowed to grow to. Use for no limit.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsWriterOptions.AllocateSize
member.summary: Extra bytes to allocate when the buffer must grow. Default is .

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1
member.summary: Wrapper around BCS-serialized bytes with a known schema, supporting conversion to hex/base58/base64 and parsing back.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1.#ctor(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.BcsType{`0},System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a serialized BCS value (typically from ).
member.param: The BCS type that was used to serialize.
The serialized bytes (not modified; stored by reference if possible).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1.ToBytes
member.summary: Returns the raw BCS bytes (a copy to prevent mutation).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1.ToHex
member.summary: Returns the bytes as a lowercase hex string (no prefix).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1.ToBase64
member.summary: Returns the bytes as a Base64 string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1.ToBase58
member.summary: Returns the bytes as a Base58 string (Bitcoin alphabet).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.SerializedBcs`1.Parse
member.summary: Deserializes the bytes back to a value of type .

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Uleb128
member.summary: ULEB128 (Unsigned Little Endian Base 128) encoding and decoding for BCS.

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Uleb128.MaxBytesForU64
member.summary: Maximum number of bytes for a ULEB128-encoded 64-bit value.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Uleb128.Encode(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Encodes an unsigned 64-bit value in ULEB128 format.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Uleb128.Encode(System.UInt64,System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encodes an unsigned 64-bit value in ULEB128 format into the given span.
member.param: Span to write encoded bytes to.
member.exception: Thrown when destination is too small.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.Uleb128.Decode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Decodes a ULEB128-encoded value from the given span.
member.returns: Decoded value and the number of bytes consumed.
member.exception: Thrown on buffer overflow or invalid encoding (e.g. more than 10 bytes for u64).
